description: The image displays the logo of the European Environment Agency (EEA). The logo consists of a circular graphic element on the left, partially resembling a cogwheel or flower. The left half of the graphic is composed of teal-coloured, petal-like or gear teeth shapes, while the right half is composed of dark blue petal-like or gear teeth shapes, all arranged around a central white circle. To the right of the graphic, the text "European Environment Agency" is stacked in three lines, rendered in bold black sans-serif typeface.
